case_title: PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC VS. COLLEEN M WILLIAMS

docket_entries.description: REQUEST FOR DEFAULT REJECTED, E-FILING REJECT, (TRANSACTION ID # 100147653) SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT WILLIAMS, COLLEEN M
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR APR-12-2022 CONTINUED TO AUG-09-2022 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO ENTER DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
